columns.name: EXTERNALID
columns.description: A unique external identifier for the order

columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: The type of the order or transaction

columns.name: PROGRAM
columns.description: The program or module that created the record

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: An internal reference number for the order

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp of when the record was created or last modified

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: The unique order identifier

columns.name: TILLEGGSID
columns.description: An additional identifier for the order or transaction

columns.name: TRANSACTIONID
columns.description: The unique identifier for a specific transaction related to the order

columns.name: ACTIVITYCODE
columns.description: The code representing an activity or action associated with the order

columns.name: ACT_DET_INFO
columns.description: Detailed information about a specific activity related to the order

columns.name: FREIGHTNOTENO
columns.description: The number of a freight note associated with the order

columns.name: DELIVERYNUMBER
columns.description: A unique identifier for the delivery related to the order

columns.name: EXTERNALID
columns.description: A unique external identifier for the order (repeated column)

columns.name: DTYP
columns.description: A type or category associated with the record

columns.name: REFORDERCATEGORY
columns.description: The reference category for the order

columns.name: REFORDERCATNAME
columns.description: The name of the reference category for the order

columns.name: R_NUMBER
columns.description: A unique number or identifier for the recipient

columns.name: R_NAME
columns.description: The name of the recipient associated with the order

columns.name: R_PHONE1
columns.description: The first phone number for the recipient

columns.name: R_PHONE2
columns.description: The second phone number for the recipient (optional)

columns.name: R_EMAIL
columns.description: The email address of the recipient

columns.name: ADR_STREET
columns.description: The street address of the recipient

columns.name: ADR_POSTALCODE
columns.description: The postal code or zip code for the recipient's address

columns.name: ADR_CITY
columns.description: The city of the recipient's address

columns.name: ADR_COUNTRY
columns.description: The country where the recipient is located

columns.name: OVERF_STATUS
columns.description: The status related to overflow or excess conditions for the order

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The user identifier associated with the record creation or modification
